004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.mock;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.Enablement.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util.RestUtils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.rest.client.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.rest.client.RestRequest;
032import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger.*;
034
035import jakarta.servlet.*;
036
037/**
038 * Next-generation mock REST client that routes requests in-process to a Juneau {@link RestContext}.
039 *
040 * <p>
041 * Use this class to write serverless unit tests for {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest @Rest}-annotated
042 * resource classes.  Requests are dispatched directly to the {@link RestContext} without any network activity,
043 * making tests fast and self-contained.
044 *
045 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
046 * <p class='bjava'>
047 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>
048 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyResource {
049 *       <ja>@RestGet</ja>(<js>"/hello"</js>)
050 *       <jk>public</jk> String hello() { <jk>return</jk> <js>"Hello!"</js>; }
051 *    }
052 *
053 *    <ja>@Test</ja>
054 *    <jk>void</jk> test() <jk>throws</jk> Exception {
055 *       <jk>try</jk> (<jv>client</jv> = MockRestClient.<jsm>create</jsm>(MyResource.<jk>class</jk>)) {
056 *          var <jv>body</jv> = <jv>client</jv>.get(<js>"/hello"</js>).run().asString();
057 *          assertEquals(<js>"\"Hello!\""</js>, <jv>body</jv>);
058 *       }
059 *    }
060 * </p>
061 *
062 * <p>
063 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
064 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
065 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
066 * (and possibly earlier).
067 *
068 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
069 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
070 * </ul>
071 *
072 * @since 9.2.1
073 */
074@SuppressWarnings({
075   "resource" // RestClient is closed by MockRestClient.close(); transport is owned by the client
076})
077public final class MockRestClient implements Closeable {
078
079   private static final Map<Class<?>, RestContext> restContextCache = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
080
081   private final RestClient client;
082
083   private MockRestClient(RestClient client) {
084      this.client = client;
085   }
086
087   /**
088    * Creates an {@link MockRestClient} backed by the given REST bean or bean class.
089    *
090    * <p>
091    * {@link RestContext} instances are cached per class for performance.
092    *
093    * @param impl
094    *    The REST bean or bean class annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest @Rest}.
095    *    If a {@link Class}, it must have a no-arg constructor.
096    * @return A new client. Never <jk>null</jk>.
097    */
098   public static MockRestClient create(Object impl) {
099      return builder(impl).build();
100   }
101
102   /**
103    * Returns a new {@link Builder} for the given REST bean or bean class.
104    *
105    * @param impl
106    *    The REST bean or bean class annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest @Rest}.
107    *    If a {@link Class}, it must have a no-arg constructor.
108    * @return A new builder. Never <jk>null</jk>.
109    */
110   public static Builder builder(Object impl) {
111      return new Builder(impl);
112   }
113
114   /**
115    * Creates a GET request to the given path.
116    *
117    * @param path The request path (relative to the resource's servlet path). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
118    * @return A new {@link RestRequest}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
119    */
120   public RestRequest get(String path) { return client.get(path); }
121
122   /**
123    * Creates a POST request to the given path.
124    *
125    * @param path The request path. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
126    * @return A new {@link RestRequest}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
127    */
128   public RestRequest post(String path) { return client.post(path); }
129
130   /**
131    * Creates a PUT request to the given path.
132    *
133    * @param path The request path. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
134    * @return A new {@link RestRequest}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
135    */
136   public RestRequest put(String path) { return client.put(path); }
137
138   /**
139    * Creates a PATCH request to the given path.
140    *
141    * @param path The request path. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
142    * @return A new {@link RestRequest}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
143    */
144   public RestRequest patch(String path) { return client.patch(path); }
145
146   /**
147    * Creates a DELETE request to the given path.
148    *
149    * @param path The request path. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
150    * @return A new {@link RestRequest}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
151    */
152   public RestRequest delete(String path) { return client.delete(path); }
153
154   /**
155    * Creates a HEAD request to the given path.
156    *
157    * @param path The request path. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
158    * @return A new {@link RestRequest}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
159    */
160   public RestRequest head(String path) { return client.head(path); }
161
162   /**
163    * Creates a request with the given HTTP method and path.
164    *
165    * @param method The HTTP method. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
166    * @param path The request path. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
167    * @return A new {@link RestRequest}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
168    */
169   public RestRequest request(String method, String path) { return client.request(method, path); }
170
171   /**
172    * Returns the underlying {@link RestClient}.
173    *
174    * @return The client. Never <jk>null</jk>.
175    */
176   public RestClient getClient() { return client; }
177
178   @Override /* Closeable */
179   public void close() throws IOException {
180      client.close();
181   }
182
183   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
184   // Inner types
185   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
186
187   /**
188    * Fluent builder for {@link MockRestClient}.
189    *
190    * @since 9.2.1
191    */
192   public static final class Builder implements BeanStoreOverridable<Builder> {
193
194      private final Object impl;
195      private String contextPath;
196      private BeanStore overridingBeanStore;
197      private Parser defaultParser;
198
199      private Builder(Object impl) {
200         this.impl = impl;
201      }
202
203      /**
204       * Sets the servlet context path (e.g. {@code "/myapp"}).
205       *
206       * @param value The context path. May be <jk>null</jk>.
207       * @return This object.
208       */
209      public Builder contextPath(String value) {
210         contextPath = toValidContextPath(value);
211         return this;
212      }
213
214      /**
215       * Installs a {@link BeanStore} as the {@code overridingParent} of the {@link RestContext}'s
216       * bean store, so test-time overrides (e.g. {@code TestBeanStore}) resolve at tier 1 of the
217       * lookup chain &mdash; above the resource's local {@code @Bean} factory entries.
218       *
219       * <p>
220       * Setting this disables the per-resource {@link RestContext} cache for the duration of this
221       * build, so the overlay is not silently shared with a previously-cached instance.
222       *
223       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
224       * <p class='bjava'>
225       *    <jk>var</jk> <jv>overlay</jv> = <jk>new</jk> TestBeanStore().override(MyService.<jk>class</jk>, mockSvc);
226       *    <jk>try</jk> (<jv>client</jv> = MockRestClient.<jsm>builder</jsm>(MyResource.<jk>class</jk>)
227       *          .overridingBeanStore(<jv>overlay</jv>)
228       *          .build()) {
229       *       <jv>client</jv>.get(<js>"/widgets/1"</js>).run().assertStatus().is(200);
230       *    }
231       * </p>
232       *
233       * @param value The override layer. Can be <jk>null</jk> to clear a previously-set value.
234       * @return This object.
235       *
236       * @since 10.0.0
237       */
238      @Override
239      public Builder overridingBeanStore(BeanStore value) {
240         overridingBeanStore = value;
241         return this;
242      }
243
244      /**
245       * Sets an explicit default parser used when the response {@code Content-Type} matches no registered parser.
246       *
247       * <p>
248       * Setting this also causes the client to advertise the parser's media types in the {@code Accept} header,
249       * so the server must be able to produce that content type.  Omit this (the default) when the target
250       * resource does not have a JSON serializer configured.
251       *
252       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
253       * <p class='bjava'>
254       *    <jk>try</jk> (<jv>client</jv> = MockRestClient.<jsm>builder</jsm>(MyJsonResource.<jk>class</jk>)
255       *          .defaultParser(JsonParser.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>)
256       *          .build()) {
257       *       <jk>var</jk> <jv>api</jv> = <jv>client</jv>.getClient().remote(MyApi.<jk>class</jk>);
258       *       <jv>api</jv>.someMethod();
259       *    }
260       * </p>
261       *
262       * @param value The parser. May be <jk>null</jk>.
263       * @return This object.
264       */
265      public Builder defaultParser(Parser value) {
266         defaultParser = value;
267         return this;
268      }
269
270      /**
271       * Builds and returns the {@link MockRestClient}.
272       *
273       * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
274       */
275      @SuppressWarnings({
276         "java:S112" // Re-wrap as RuntimeException - build() wraps arbitrary checked exceptions from reflection (newInstance) and RestContext init/postInit; no specific type fits and the fluent build() method cannot declare checked exceptions.
277      })
278      public MockRestClient build() {
279         try {
280            var c = impl instanceof Class<?> c2 ? c2 : impl.getClass();
281            var overlay = overridingBeanStore;
282            RestContext restContext;
283            if (overlay == null && restContextCache.containsKey(c)) {
284               restContext = restContextCache.get(c);
285            } else {
286               var isClass = impl instanceof Class<?>;
287               var o = isClass ? ((Class<?>)impl).getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance() : impl;
288               restContext = new RestContext(new RestContext.Args(o.getClass(), null, null, () -> o, "", bs -> {
289                  bs.addBean(Enablement.class, CONDITIONAL);
290                  bs.addBeanType(CallLogger.class, BasicTestCallLogger.class);
291               }, overlay, null, RestContext.ContextKind.ROOT)).postInit().postInitChildFirst();
292               if (overlay == null)
293                  restContextCache.put(c, restContext);
294            }
295
296            var servletPath = toValidContextPath(restContext.getFullPath());
297            var fullContextPath = emptyIfNull(contextPath) + emptyIfNull(servletPath);
298
299         var transport = new JuneauRestTransport(restContext, servletPath);
300         var clientBuilder = RestClient.builder()
301            .transport(transport)
302            .rootUrl("http://localhost" + fullContextPath)
303            .defaultSerializer(JsonSerializer.DEFAULT);
304         if (defaultParser != null)
305            clientBuilder.defaultParser(defaultParser);
306         var ngClient = clientBuilder.build();
307
308            return new MockRestClient(ngClient);
309         } catch (Exception e) {
310            throw new RuntimeException("Could not initialize MockRestClient", e);
311         }
312      }
313
314      private static String emptyIfNull(String s) { return s == null ? "" : s; }
315   }
316
317   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
318   // Transport implementation
319   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
320
321   /**
322    * An {@link HttpTransport} that dispatches requests in-process through a Juneau {@link RestContext}.
323    */
324   private static final class JuneauRestTransport implements HttpTransport {
325
326      private final RestContext restContext;
327      private final Object restObject;
328      private final String servletPath;
329
330      JuneauRestTransport(RestContext restContext, String servletPath) {
331         this.restContext = restContext;
332         this.restObject = restContext.getResource();
333         this.servletPath = servletPath;
334      }
335
336      @Override /* HttpTransport */
337      public TransportResponse execute(TransportRequest request) throws TransportException {
338         try {
339            var method = request.getMethod();
340            var uri = request.getUri().toString();
341
342            var servletReq = MockServletRequest.create(method, uri)
343               .servletPath(servletPath)
344               .contextPath("");
345
346            for (var h : request.getHeaders())
347               servletReq.header(h.name(), h.value());
348
349            var body = request.getBody();
350            if (body != null) {
351               var baos = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
352               body.writeTo(baos);
353               servletReq.content(baos.toByteArray());
354            }
355
356            var servletRes = MockServletResponse.create();
357
358            restContext.execute(restObject, servletReq, servletRes);
359
360            if (servletRes.getStatus() == 0) // HTT: would require a buggy RestContext that never sets a status
361               throw new TransportException("REST context returned status 0 — response was never committed");
362
363            var responseBuilder = TransportResponse.builder()
364               .statusCode(servletRes.getStatus())
365               .reasonPhrase(servletRes.getMessage());
366
367            for (var name : servletRes.getHeaderNames())
368               for (var value : servletRes.getHeaders(name))
369                  responseBuilder.header(name, value);
370
371            var content = servletRes.getContent();
372            if (content.length > 0)
373               responseBuilder.body(new ByteArrayInputStream(content));
374
375            return responseBuilder.build();
376
377         } catch (TransportException e) {
378            throw e;
379         } catch (ServletException | IOException e) {
380            throw new TransportException("In-process dispatch failed: " + e.getMessage(), e);
381         }
382      }
383   }
384}
